name: professional-blog-posting-engine
description: Produce publication-ready business blog and SEO article packages from a concrete brief, including strategy, outline, article, metadata, internal links, schema recommendation, image brief, promotion copy, and QA. Use for full professional articles; do not use for short posts, generic rewriting, or research without an article deliverable.

resources.description: Observed example for verifying an existing website blog repo/content model before creating an ongoing blog-poster agent or staging posts.
